design_philosophy: Authority, Clarity, Truth. The UI must feel objective, rigid, and functional. Perfect for an enterprise audit and invoice processing tool. Minimize decoration; maximize data clarity. Use high contrast, sharp edges, and monochrome foundations with strict, highly visible signal colors.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: The 'Control Room' Grid. Dense, data correlation, high scanability. Every pixel utilized.
spacing_and_layout.gap_strategy: gap-4 or gap-6 for tight grid alignment
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) to maintain a rigid, technical feel
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Avoid soft shadows. Use sharp 1px borders or hard offset shadows (e.g., shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]) for interactive elements.

Sidebar.style: Solid white background, 1px right border. Strict list of links. No fancy hover backgrounds, just a bold left-border highlight or sharp background shift (e.g., hover:bg-gray-100).

DashboardCards.style: Flat background, 1px border. Cardless feel. Data label small uppercase, main metric huge (text-4xl) mono or sans.

UploadSection.style: Dashed 2px border, gray background. On drag-over, switch to solid primary color border with primary light bg.
UploadSection.interaction: Clear, objective instructions. Use mono typography for supported file types.

InvoiceTable.style: Dense layout. border-collapse. Bottom border on rows. Sticky header with gray background.
InvoiceTable.text: Numbers must use tabular-nums (font-mono or equivalent). Keep text text-sm.
InvoiceTable.pagination: Standard pagination logic, customized to remove rounded corners.

StatusBadge.style: Solid sharp background with high contrast text and a 1px border. No rounded-full pills; use sharp rectangles.

InvoiceDetail.layout: Two-column grid: PDF/Image viewer on the left (col-span-7), Data fields & Actions on the right (col-span-5).
InvoiceDetail.fields: Use robust inputs but remove rounded corners. Focus states must have a sharp 2px primary color ring.

AuditTimeline.style: Vertical strict line. Small circular nodes. Timestamp in monospace. Event description in standard sans.

motion.transitions: Only for opacity, background-color, and slight transforms. No bouncy animations.

backgrounds.description: Login page structural background. Set opacity to 10% to keep it extremely subtle.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure strict WCAG AA. Text on status badges must meet 4.5:1.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must use focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-1 focus:ring-[#002FA7].

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure your file extensions are .js/.jsx, not .tsx as requested by user constraints.
Extend Tailwind config to use these fonts: 'Chivo' for sans/headings, 'IBM Plex Sans' for body, 'JetBrains Mono' for mono.
Do NOT use standard rounded Shadcn cards. Strip 'rounded-xl' or 'rounded-lg' from the Shadcn components and replace with 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm'.
For the Invoice Detail view, heavily utilize grid layouts (e.g., grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6) to create a 'Control Room' dense aesthetic.
Do not invent any generic blue/indigo palettes. Use the precise Hex codes provided in this JSON.
Ensure all components have data-testid attributes per the conventions.
